StudioBooking.title: StudioBooking
StudioBooking.description: Represents a studio booking made by a user.

userId.description: Reference to User. (Relationship: User 1:N StudioBooking). Optional for guest bookings.

name.description: The name of the person who booked the session.

email.description: The email of the person who booked the session.

phone.description: The phone number of the person who booked the session.

bookingDateTime.description: The date and time the studio is booked for.

durationMinutes.description: The duration of the booking in minutes.

notes.description: Any additional notes or requirements for the booking.

Merchandise.title: Merchandise
Merchandise.description: Represents a merchandise item for sale.

id.description: Unique identifier for the merchandise item.

name.description: The name of the merchandise item.

description.description: A detailed description of the merchandise item.

price.description: The price of the merchandise item.

imageUrl.description: URL of the image for the merchandise item.

stockQuantity.description: The number of items currently in stock.

MusicTrack.title: MusicTrack
MusicTrack.description: Represents a music track uploaded to the platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the music track.

title.description: The title of the music track.

audioUrl.description: URL of the audio file for the music track.

imageUrl.description: URL of the image associated with the music track.

uploadDateTime.description: The date and time the music track was uploaded.

Artist.title: Artist
Artist.description: Represents an artist featured on Verse3 Records.

genre.description: The genre of music the artist performs.

NewsEvent.title: NewsEvent
NewsEvent.description: Represents a news article or event announcement.

id.description: Unique identifier for the news event.

title.description: The title of the news event.

content.description: The content of the news event (e.g., article text, event details).

publishDateTime.description: The date and time the news event was published.

imageUrl.description: URL of the image associated with the news event.

UserProfile.title: User
UserProfile.description: Represents a user of the Verse3 Records website.

email.description: The email address of the user.

DemoSubmission.title: DemoSubmission
DemoSubmission.description: Represents a demo submission from an artist.

artistName.description: The name of the artist submitting the demo.

trackTitle.description: The title of the submitted track.

audioUrl.description: URL to the uploaded audio file in Firebase Storage.

imageUrl.description: URL to the optional uploaded image file in Firebase Storage.

message.description: An optional message from the artist.

submittedAt.description: The timestamp when the demo was submitted.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profile information, including name and email. Only the authenticated user can access their own profile.

/studioBookings/{bookingId}.description: Stores all studio bookings. This collection is readable by all authenticated users to check for slot availability, but writeable only by the user creating their own booking. An additional `userId` field on the document ensures ownership is correctly attributed and enforced.

/demoSubmissions/{submissionId}.description: Stores demo submissions from artists. Writeable by anyone, but not publicly readable to ensure privacy. Admins can view submissions in the Firebase Console.
